events.event_title: FBI Evidence Photography at 9 E 71st St, Case 31E-NY-3027571
events.description: FBI evidence photographer documented and photographed the interior of Epstein residence at 9 East 71st Street as part of case 31E-NY-3027571
events.nexus_reasoning: FBI executed evidence collection at Epstein personal residence as part of his criminal case

evidence.excerpt:
Date: 7/6/19
Case ID: 31E-NY-3027571
Photographer: [Redacted]
Location: 9 East 71st St, New York, NY
Agency: FBI

The image shows a large, ornate wooden double door set within a stone facade. A vintage lantern hangs above the door. To the left of the door, there is a smaller black door with a red sign that says "HOLD YOUR HORSE". To the right of the main door, there is a brass mail slot and a fire hydrant.
The image shows a building with large wooden doors, several windows with black grates, and trees in front of it. A dark-colored car is parked in the foreground.
The image shows the letters "JE" made of bronze, mounted on a light-colored stone wall. To the right of the wall is a wooden door.

A brass number 9 is mounted on a stone wall. To the left of the number 9, there is a metal intercom system with a keypad and speaker. To the left of the intercom, there is a light switch. A wooden door is visible on the left side of the image.
A wall-mounted organizer with several labeled pockets. The visible labels are: GSJ, LSJ, ZORRO, PB, and PARIS.

events.event_title: PBSO Books Epstein (Jacket #0338617, Booking 20060723017) for Photo Lineup
events.description: Palm Beach Sheriff's Office compiled photo lineup information for Jeffrey Epstein (Jacket #0338617, Booking ID 20060723017), listing him as white male, 53 years old, 6 ft 0 in, 180 lbs, single; Palm Beach Sheriff's Office assembled multiple six-person photo lineups at 2:22 PM on August 9, 2006 for victim identification of Jeffrey Epstein as suspect; Palm Beach Sheriff's Office administered follow-up photo lineup at 2:30 PM on August 11, 2006, two days after initial lineup compilation for Epstein case
events.nexus_reasoning: Epstein was directly booked and included in PBSO photo lineup as a criminal suspect
